nasb.text: So he said, “Go and see where he is, that I may send and take him.” And it was told him, saying, “Behold, he is in Dothan.”

esv.text: And he said, “Go and see where he is, that I may send and seize him.” It was told him, “Behold, he is in Dothan.”

cnv.text: 於是王說：“你們去看看他在哪裡，我要派人把他捉住。”有人告訴他說：“看哪！他正在多坍。”

ccb.text: 王说：“去找出他在哪里，我派人去捉拿他。”王得知以利沙在多坍后，
